Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Skull Aegis Heat-attuned Tower Shield Armour: 275 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.2778 Unique ID: f40aebc3198286a518569f637e60363431bfce04cd7aa837d2abcda1ed915e45 Shaper Item Hunter Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-G LevelReq: 72 Implicits: 1 Scorch Enemies when you Block their Damage 80% increased Chance to Block Socketed Gems have 30% increased Reservation Efficiency 14% Chance to Block Spell Damage +45% to Lightning Resistance Recover 5% of Life when you Block {crafted}+70 to maximum Life

Rarity: RARE Death Mantle Sacred Chainmail Armour: 997 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.9985 Energy Shield: 200 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.9848 Unique ID: 60d4e19f97f0b1e07b8c2368bd43d0e543bd4d77b6ac807cd0be1cd9e05609e4 Shaper Item Crusader Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-W-B-R-G-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Life Modifier magnitudes {crafted}Has 1 White Socket +153 to maximum Life Recover 4% of Energy Shield on Kill 12% increased Area of Effect 18% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Lightning Damage Enemies you Kill have a 35% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage 9% of Lightning Damage taken Recouped as Life +1.93% to Spell Critical Strike Chance {crafted}+24 to Intelligence {crafted}23% chance to Avoid being Shocked

Rarity: UNIQUE Headhunter Leather Belt Unique ID: fcc012f513893521690240c03db0288cbe4fc47a4630eb90823cce7cad1b895d Item Level: 2 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 10% increased Area of Effect +51 to Strength +52 to Dexterity +58 to maximum Life 30% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds Corrupted
